description: A faithful pink-white mechanical Snoopy-style companion dog Codex pet with oversized round head, soft drooping ears, rose goggles, plush enamel body, and gentle rose-gold joints.

idle.notes: Quiet standing idle with tiny blink, slight ear motion, and gentle tail sway.

walk.notes: Directional relaxed walk used for movement and drag-facing behavior.

curious.notes: Subtle head tilt and observant look through the round goggles.

happy.notes: Restrained happy greeting with a small paw lift and brighter expression.

sleep.notes: Gentle dozing loop with closed eyes, relaxed ears, and soft breathing.

sip.notes: Optional text-free pink bottle sip loop that preserves face and goggles readability.

sit.notes: Cozy seated settle loop stored in the spare atlas row.

deep_rest.notes: Deeper sleepy slump used as an extra rest state.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses the same true-facing walk rows as locomotion.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses a true left-facing strip
right drag uses a true right-facing strip
walk_left and walk_right are not swapped
head, goggles, nose, body, paws, and tail stay directionally unified in both walk rows
left drag never faces right and right drag never faces left
